# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: allow-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    targetTags:
    - allow-ssh
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"

- name: allow-rdp
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    targetTags:
    - allow-rdp
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "3389"

- name: allow-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    targetTags:
    - allow-http
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "80"

- name: allow-https
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    targetTags:
    - allow-https
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "443"

- name: allow-dev-access
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    targetTags:
    - allow-dev-access
    sourceRanges:
    - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
    - IPProtocol: tcp
      ports:
      - "22"
      - "3389"
      - "80"
      - "443"
    direction: INGRESS
    targetServiceAccounts:
    - some-developer-service-account@gcp-sa-123456.iam.gserviceaccount.com
